name: Tapenade
recipeIngredient: 6 anchovy filets soaked in milk overnight, patted
1 cup pitted olives, Gaeta or Calamata
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend all ingredients until a smooth paste is formed (about 2 minutes).
2. Tapenade may be refrigerated several weeks, well wrapped.
3. Yield: 2 cups
